zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Darell於1465年出生在英國維爾爾時，他的父親Sir George Darrell46歲，母親Joan Haute29歲。他於1487年與Jane Croft在英國英格蘭維爾爾拉姆斯波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1529年在英國維爾爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1530年3月9日在英國維爾爾拉姆斯波利享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾拉姆斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Darell于1465年出生在英国維爾爾时，他的父亲Sir George Darrell46岁，母亲Joan Haute29岁。他于1487年与Jane Croft在英国英格兰維爾爾拉姆斯波利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1529年在英国維爾爾被列为member of parliament。他去世于1530年3月9日在英国維爾爾拉姆斯波利享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾拉姆斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Darell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Darell was born in 1465, in Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir George Darrell, was 46 and his mother, Joan Haute, was 29. He married Jane Croft in 1487, in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. In 1529, at the age of 64, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Wiltshire, England. He died on 9 March 1530, in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Darell est né en 1465, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Darrell, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Joan Haute, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Jane Croft en 1487, à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. En 1529, à l’âge de 64 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 9 mars 1530, à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Darell 1465 in Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir George Darrell 46 und seine Mutter Joan Haute 29. Er hat 1487 in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Jane Croft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1529, als er 64 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament in Wiltshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. März 1530 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Darell è nato il nel 1465 nel Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Sir George Darrell, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Joan Haute, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Jane Croft nel 1487, nel Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1529, all'età di 64 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Wiltshire, England. Morì il 9 marzo 1530, nel Ramsbury, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Darellが1465年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir George Darrellは46歳，母Joan Hauteは29歳であった。1487年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアラムスブリーでJane Croftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1529年，64歳の時，イギリスウィルトシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1530年3月9日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアラムスブリーで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアラムスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Darell(이)가 1465년 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir George Darrell(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Haute(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 램스버이에서 Jane Croft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1529년, 64세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 윌츠히르에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1530년 3월 9일 영국 윌츠히르 램스버이에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 램스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Darell nasceu em 1465, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir George Darrell, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Joan Haute, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Croft em 1487, em Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1529, com 64 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 9 de março de 1530, em Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Darell родился в 1465 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir George Darrell было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Haute, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Croft в 1487 г. в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1529 году, в возрасте 64 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности уилцхир, Англия. Он умер 9 марта 1530 г. в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности рамсбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Darell nació en 1465, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir George Darrell, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Joan Haute, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Jane Croft en 1487, en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1529, a la edad de 64 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1530, en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Ramsbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
